title: Marcus Thorne Signs Six-Year Extension Worth $340 Million
description: The largest guaranteed contract in league history secures Thorne's future with the franchise through 2032.

title: Elena Vance Advances to Australian Open Final
description: A dominant straight-sets victory in the semifinals earns Vance her second consecutive Australian Open final appearance.

title: Jordan Rivers Named NBA All-Star Game Captain
description: Rivers receives his fifth All-Star selection and is voted by fans as Western Conference captain.

title: LionStride Opens New Office in London
description: Expanding our global footprint with a new European headquarters to better serve athletes and partners across the continent.

title: Sarah Jenkins Breaks 200m World Record in Tokyo
description: Jenkins shatters the long-standing world record with a stunning 21.34-second sprint at the Tokyo Invitational.

title: Leo Sterling Wins Premier League Player of the Month
description: Three goals and four assists in January earn Sterling his first Player of the Month award this season.
